since_last: 55% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.33%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 55% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.14% · BTC -0.75% · Gold -1.25% · Nasdaq100 -0.54%. 55% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.33%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.33%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.51%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: NOW is the standout at +6.59%
cards.body: Leaders: NOW +6.59%, SKHY +6.34%, AMBA +2.56%, MU +2.53%, S +2.41%. Laggards: TSLA -5.47%, GOOGL -3.79%, NXPI -2.62%, AMZN -2.01%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.00% at $116.41
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.00% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
